## Entities.ITaskEntityInvocation type

A task invocation - either a reference to a library task or an inline task definition. Discriminated by the presence of `task` (inline) vs `taskId` (ref).

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ITaskEntityInvocation = IInlineTaskEntity | ITaskRefEntity;
```
**References:** [IInlineTaskEntity](./ts-chocolate.entities.iinlinetaskentity.md)
